name: Engineering Mathematics for CEE
description: CIVE198 is a Year 1 Mathematics module for students of programmes taught in the Department of Civil & Environmental Engineering. It is designed to reinforce and build upon A-level (or equivalent) Mathematics, providing students with the strong background required for engineering modules in year 2, 3 and 4.

assessment.title: .  Students who pass at the first attempt will be awarded 100% for this assessment
